positive: A minimalist, high-contrast graphic illustration of a stylized celestial forest scene. The central subject is a trio of stylized, bioluminescent glowing mushrooms forming a natural archway. These mushrooms grow amongst the roots of ancient, symmetrical trees that depict strong, elegant silhouettes. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed for repeating pattern print. Use a limited, striking color palette of deep midnight blue, vibrant glowing teal, and stark white. The style should be highly graphic, vector-inspired, combining elements of Art Deco poster art with modern Scandinavian nature illustration. Clean lines, bold negative space, and perfect symmetry are crucial. Flat colors with subtle gradients for glow effects. Highly intricate yet clean lines. Suitable for apparel print.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, copyright, blur, artifacts, noise, poor anatomy, low resolution, extra limbs, cluttered, messy, photorealistic, 3d render, jpeg artifacts
